routes.name: approved_prd_to_relevant_senior_owner
routes.hard_rule: Arthur routes to the relevant senior owner, not always Marcus.

routes.name: task_red_green_to_next_task
routes.hard_rule: No current task green, no next task.

routes.name: green_approved_pr_to_merge
routes.trigger: All task checks green, GitHub PR checks green, required approval received
routes.hard_rule: No GitHub PR green and approval, no merge.
